articles.title: India bat first, Suthar gets maiden Test cap
articles.description: Afghanistan have handed a Test debut to spin-bowling allrounder Nangeyalia Kharote

articles.title: India make red-ball switch for Afghanistan challenge in New Chandigarh's maiden Test
articles.description: India will have to decide between Harsh Dubey and Manav Suthar for the third spinner's spot

articles.title: England make inroads after New Zealand set 254 to win
articles.description: Nathan Smith six-for keeps NZ in contention as 17 wickets go down on day two at Lord's

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer to replace Suryakumar as India's T20I captain
articles.description: Suryakumar had led India to the T20 World Cup title in March, but has been in poor batting form

articles.title: KS Bharat announces retirement from international cricket
articles.description: He represented India in seven Test matches, including in the 2023 WTC final

articles.title: Shaun Tait resigns as Bangladesh fast bowling coach
articles.description: After 12 months in the role, he is stepping down to prioritise family time

articles.title: New Zealand home summer to start with blockbuster all-format India tour
articles.description: The New Zealand men's side will also host Sri Lanka for an all-format tour, while the women will host Bangladesh for three T20Is and as many ODIs

articles.title: ICC approves red-to-pink ball change to reduce bad-light impact in Test cricket
articles.description: Both teams will have to agree to changing the ball from red to pink in case of bad light during a Test match

articles.title: Rohit Sharma doesn't need to prove himself, India need him in World Cup 2027: Childhood coach Dinesh Lad
articles.description: "Rohit not playing any other format does not mean he is having free time and enjoying life. He is practising every day and working constantly on his fitness," Dinesh Lad said.

articles.title: 'I personally think he should play Test cricket for the larger good of the game' - R Ashwin on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi ahead of India A stint
articles.description: Ravichandran Ashwin, however, mentioned that youngsters at the grassroots level are not too eager to play red-ball cricket and are looking to go for the big shots after blocking a few deliveries.

articles.title: 'He is miles ahead of the other contenders' - Mohammad Kaif recommends Suryakumar Yadav’s successor as T20I captain
articles.description: Mohammad Kaif opined that Shreyas Iyer is the best person to lead the Indian team in T20I cricket.

articles.title: ENG vs NZ 2026: ‘MCC will be the first to admit…’ - Michael Vaughan questions Lord’s pitch after 16-wicket opening day
articles.description: The day belonged to the fast bowlers as both batting line-ups struggled to cope with the challenging conditions.

articles.title: Michael Clarke reveals details of horrific car crash after IPL 2026 final
articles.description: The former cricketer was heading to the airport, after the completion of the game, when he revealed his car had crashed into the underside of another truck.

articles.title: T20 Blast 2026: ‘People advised me against joining Yorkshire’ - Moeen Ali eyes historic title with county
articles.description: "A lot of people were disappointed with me coming to Yorkshire, but if you can change the mind of one person you've done a great job," said Ali.
